source.subject: Information for Capstone Project Platform Production
source.notes: Structured from the project information shared by email. Pending figures and media permissions still need confirmation before final publication.

cpVideoFolder.label: CP video
cpVideoFolder.status: needs access and embed/link permission check

cohorts.label: Coh1
cohorts.platformDisplayPlan: Students' CP topics will be listed on the platform.

cohorts.label: Coh2
cohorts.involvement: Received initial CRAC project support at the stage of CPII.

cohorts.label: Coh3
cohorts.involvement: Current cohort, both CP1 and CP2 fully supported by CRAC project resources.
cohorts.platformDisplayPlan: Students' CPs can be shown as selected projects after the display style is confirmed.

cohorts.label: Coh4
cohorts.involvement: Upcoming cohort; first to experience the fully revamped CP1.
cohorts.platformDisplayPlan: Upcoming project entries can be displayed as a preview section if approved.

projects.title: Language Learning App CVC CHAMP
projects.description: A learning app that provides extra support to help children aged 4-5 years old learn segmenting and blending CVC outside the classroom in a fun way!

projects.title: CantonLyricists粵填 - Cantonese Lyrics Writing Tool
projects.description: A web-based tool that helps users create accurate, melodic, and expressive Cantonese lyrics.

projects.title: Gamified Educational Platform for Mastering Chinese Multi-Syllable Characters
projects.description: This platform is designed to provide an engaging and interactive environment where learners can practice and understand complex characters effectively.

projects.title: Interactive Language Learning Game Platform
projects.description: An engaging and academically effective grammar learning game. The game will provide a joyful learning experience that motivates learners through interactive gameplay.

projects.title: Cantonese Language Learning Game
projects.description: This language learning app is a free arcade-style game that provides a gamified experience for both Cantonese learners and native speakers.

projects.title: A learning app that focuses on improving the standard of Mandarin pronunciation
projects.description: The app is designed to help users systematically learn the difference between each easily confused Mandarin pronunciation. An interactive 3D app that helps learners master Mandarin's tricky nasal (n/ng) and retroflex (zh/ch/sh vs. z/c/s) sounds through 3D articulatory visualization.

projects.title: GONG AR
projects.description: A language learning app to enhance Cantonese pronunciation and expand Cantonese vocabulary through interactive gameplay using AR.

projects.title: Dragon Digraph
projects.description: A child-centered learning app for mastering English blends through speech and play.

projects.title: The Adventure of Prepositions
projects.description: Please refer to the student's CP video.

projects.title: Hong Kong Sign Language
projects.description: Please refer to the student's CP video.

projects.title: PRAGMA
projects.description: PRAGMA is an AI-supported pragmatic language training tool for children with ASD, focusing on non-literal language and social cue interpretation.

projects.title: MailStone
projects.description: MailStone is an accessibility-focused academic email assistant that helps SEN students draft polite, policy-aware university emails through guided interaction.

projects.title: VocalFlow
projects.description: VocalFlow is an acoustic pronunciation training tool that helps Hong Kong English learners improve connected speech, rhythm, linking, and fluency through visual feedback.

projects.title: Real-Time Esports Translation Overlay
projects.description: This project proposes a mobile subtitle overlay that captures live esports commentary, transcribes it, translates it with gaming terminology support, and displays subtitles during live streams.

projects.title: VoxCaster
projects.description: VoxCaster aims to transform live football commentary into personalized emotional commentary styles, such as more exciting, tactical, child-friendly, or nostalgic versions.

projects.title: Low-Pressure Communication Tool
projects.description: This project proposes a low-pressure, non-verbal communication tool for NCS and SEN children aged 4-9, allowing them to express urgent needs, distress, discomfort, or sensory overload without having to speak directly in a busy classroom.

projects.title: RAG-Based AI for SEN/NCS School Communication
projects.description: This project proposes an AI assistant that translates and explains Hong Kong school notices, SEN jargon, and school-home communication for non-Chinese-speaking parents and SEN parents.

projects.title: LingoPop
projects.description: LingoPop is a sensory-safe phonics mini-game for young ASD learners, using a simple voice-activated interaction where children practise one sound and receive a calm visual reward.
